hero.description: A confidential, anonymous channel for raising workplace concerns. No identity collected. No digital footprint. No risk. Enterprise-grade protection built for those who dare to do the right thing. Trusted by leading organizations across the globe.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps. Complete anonymity.
howItWorks.subtitle: No accounts. No emails. No identification. Your courage deserves protection.

whySawtSafe.description: Whistleblowers expose fraud worth billions every year — yet most remain silent out of fear of retaliation. Sawt Safe eliminates that fear entirely. Your identity is never collected, never stored, and never at risk.
bullets: Zero personal data collected — by design, not by policy
Encrypted before it leaves your device, encrypted at every stage
Aligned with EU, GDPR, and international protection standards
Chosen by compliance leaders across industries worldwide

features.heading: Built for trust. Engineered for courage.
features.subtitle: Every layer of Sawt Safe is purpose-built to protect the people who protect organizations.

items.title: Zero-Knowledge Privacy
items.desc: We never collect your name, email, IP address, or device fingerprint. Anonymity is engineered into every layer — not just a policy.

items.title: Military-Grade Encryption
items.desc: Every disclosure, note, and evidence file is encrypted before it leaves your device — and stays encrypted at every stage.

items.title: Tamper-Proof Audit Trail
items.desc: Every action is permanently recorded in an immutable ledger. Unalterable records that stand up to any legal scrutiny.

items.title: Worldwide Compliance
items.desc: Purpose-built to meet the EU Whistleblower Directive, GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, and regional regulatory frameworks.

items.title: Instant Response Workflow
items.desc: Compliance teams receive real-time alerts, prioritize by severity, and collaborate on investigations — ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

items.title: Always-On Availability
items.desc: Resilient cloud infrastructure with 99.9% uptime guarantee. Your channel for truth stays accessible when it matters most.

architecture.description: Sawt Safe’s architecture ensures that even system administrators cannot link a report to a person. Data flows through isolated, encrypted layers with no single point capable of identifying a reporter.
bullets: IP addresses stripped at network ingress — never logged
All sensitive fields encrypted at rest with per-record keys
Encryption keys managed with automatic rotation
Append-only audit logs — tamper-proof compliance evidence

compliance.heading: Meets the world’s strictest standards.
compliance.subtitle: Sawt Safe is designed from the ground up to satisfy international whistleblower protection and data privacy regulations.

forOrganizations.heading: Empower your compliance team.
forOrganizations.description: A powerful admin dashboard designed for speed, clarity, and accountability. Manage cases, collaborate securely, and generate audit-ready reports.

features.title: Role-Based Access
features.desc: Admin, Compliance Officer, and Viewer roles with granular permissions.

features.title: Real-Time Alerts
features.desc: Instant notifications for new reports and severity escalations.

features.title: Case Management
features.desc: Full lifecycle — triage, investigate, annotate, and resolve.

features.title: Audit-Ready Reports
features.desc: Export compliance reports. Every action timestamped and recorded.

features.title: White-Label Ready
features.desc: Deploy under your own brand with custom domain and colors.

features.title: AI-Assisted Triage
features.desc: Auto-classification, severity scoring, and duplicate detection.

items.a: Absolutely. Sawt Safe uses a zero-knowledge architecture — no IP addresses are logged, no accounts are created, and no identifying metadata is stored. Your secure code is the only connection to your disclosure.

items.q: What happens after I raise a concern?
items.a: Your disclosure is encrypted and stored securely. A dedicated compliance officer reviews it, investigates as needed, and updates the status. You can follow progress anytime using your secure code.

items.q: Can my employer find out who I am?
items.a: No. The platform is architected so that even system administrators cannot trace a disclosure back to any individual. There are no user accounts, no session identifiers, and all network fingerprints are stripped before processing.

items.q: What types of concerns can I raise?
items.a: Fraud, harassment, data misuse, policy violations, safety hazards, and any ethical or compliance concern. If you’re unsure whether something qualifies — raise it. The compliance team will assess.

items.q: Does Sawt Safe meet regulatory requirements?
items.a: Yes. Sawt Safe is purpose-built to align with the EU Whistleblower Protection Directive (2019/1937), GDPR, SOC 2, and regional frameworks including KSA governance standards.

cta.heading: Your courage deserves protection.
cta.subtitle: Anonymous. Encrypted. Untraceable. Raise your concern in under 3 minutes.
